revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:12 nguŏk 7 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:12月7日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 12월 7일]][[zh-min-nan:12 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十二月初七]][[zh:十二月初七]]
{{Not to be confused with|December 7|qq=December 7}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十二月初七|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 12월 7일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar December|qq=}} '''December 7''' is the 7th day of the month {{ill|Layue|en|Layue|qid=Q905470|lt=December (Shiwasu)|1=Layue}}, the 12th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11635368}}. == Events == * {{ill|Genroku|en|Genroku|qid=Q1325001|lt=Genroku|1=Genroku}} 8th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1696|en|1696|qid=Q7699|lt=1696|1=1696}} {{ill|January 11|en|January 11|qid=Q2247|lt=January 11|1=January 11}}) – In Osaka at Sennichimae, actors {{ill|Akane-ya Hanjū|ja|赤根屋半七|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Akane-ya Hanjū|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and {{ill|Onna-buyō Sanshō|ja|女舞三勝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Onna-buyō Sanshō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} committed double suicide; this incident later served as the subject for the jōruri play {{ill|Enyō Onna Buyō Koromo|ja|艶容女舞衣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enyō Onna Buyō Koromo|1=Hadesugata Onnnamaiginu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11614547}}.<ref>[http://example.com/source1 Title of Source 1] (accessed April 20, 2021)</ref><ref>[http://example.com/source2 Title of Source 2] (accessed April 20, 2021)</ref> * {{ill|Keiō|en|Keiō|qid=Q776775|lt=Keiō|1=Keiō}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1868|en|1868|qid=Q7717|lt=1868|1=1868}} {{ill|January 1|en|January 1|qid=Q2150|lt=January 1|1=January 1}}) – Upon the accession of {{ill|Tokugawa Ietsuna|en|Tokugawa Ietsuna|qid=Q323422|lt=Tokugawa Ietsuna|1=Tokugawa Ietsuna}}, the era name was changed from {{ill|Keian|en|Keian|qid=Q1146135|lt=Keian|1=Keian}} to {{ill|Jōō (Edo period)|en|Jōō (Edo period)|qid=Q1145081|lt=Jōō|1=Jōō (Edo period)}}. * In Keiō 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}}), the Tenmaya incident occurred: 15 members of the maritime and land aid detachments clashed with 7 members of the Shinsengumi at the Tenmaya inn on Kyoto Yusukoji Street. == Births == * {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|qid=Q1328185|lt=Keichō|1=Keichō}} 17th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1613|en|1613|qid=Q6776|lt=1613|1=1613}} {{ill|January 27|en|January 27|qid=Q2284|lt=January 27|1=January 27}}) – {{ill|Ryōjo|ja|良如|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ryōjo|1=Ryōnyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q6609302}}, a monk (died {{ill|1662|en|1662|qid=Q7574|lt=1662|1=1662}}). * {{ill|Culture|en|Culture|qid=Q11042|lt=Bunka|1=Culture}} 11th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1815|en|1815|qid=Q6948|lt=1815|1=1815}} {{ill|January 16|en|January 16|qid=Q2261|lt=January 16|1=January 16}}) – {{ill|Nabeshima Naomasa|en|Nabeshima Naomasa|qid=Q3334677|lt=Nabeshima Naomasa|1=Nabeshima Naomasa}}, head of the {{ill|Saga Domain|en|Saga Domain|qid=Q2975995|lt=Saga Domain|1=Saga Domain}} (died {{ill|1871|en|1871|qid=Q7746|lt=1871|1=1871}}). * {{ill|Bunsei|en|Bunsei|qid=Q1327119|lt=Bunsei|1=Bunsei}} 10th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1828|en|1828|qid=Q7570|lt=1828|1=1828}} {{ill|January 23|en|January 23|qid=Q2276|lt=January 23|1=January 23}}) – {{ill|Saigō Takamori|en|Saigō Takamori|qid=Q310462|lt=Saigō Takamori|1=Saigō Takamori}}, a prominent figure of the {{ill|Meiji Restoration|en|Meiji Restoration|qid=Q8707|lt=Meiji Restoration|1=Meiji Restoration}} (died {{ill|1877|en|1877|qid=Q7773|lt=1877|1=1877}}). == Deaths == * {{ill|Yōrō|en|Yōrō|qid=Q1373061|lt=Yōrō|1=Yōrō}} 5th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|721|en|721|qid=Q23541|lt=721|1=721}} {{ill|December 29|en|December 29|qid=Q2862|lt=December 29|1=December 29}}) – {{ill|Empress Genmei|en|Empress Genmei|qid=Q233224|lt=Emperor Genmei|1=Empress Genmei}}, the 43rd {{ill|Emperor of Japan|en|Emperor of Japan|qid=Q208233|lt=Emperor of Japan|1=Emperor of Japan}} (born {{ill|661|en|661|qid=Q30084|lt=661|1=661}}). * {{ill|Jōji|en|Jōji|qid=Q1146153|lt=Teiji|1=Jōji}} 6th year / {{ill|Zhengping|en|Zhengping|qid=Q11123413|lt=Shōhei|1=Zhengping}} 22nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1367|en|1367|qid=Q6202|lt=1367|1=1367}} {{ill|December 28|en|December 28|qid=Q2832|lt=December 28|1=December 28}}) – {{ill|Ashikaga Yoshiakira|en|Ashikaga Yoshiakira|qid=Q466321|lt=Ashikaga Yoshizane|1=Ashikaga Yoshiakira}}, the 2nd {{ill|Shogun|en|Shogun|qid=Q131767|lt=Shōgun|1=Shogun}} of the {{ill|Ashikaga Shogunate|1=Ashikaga shogunate|2=ja|3=室町幕府|ja|足利幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashikaga Shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 室町幕府|1=Ashikaga shogunate|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1154406}} (born {{ill|1330|en|1330|qid=Q5996|lt=1330|1=1330}}).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|12|6|12|8|11|7|1|12|1207|qq=}}
== References == {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

[[ko:음력 12월 7일]] [[ja:12月7日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:十二月初七]]
